mapper.sql: id, device_name deviceName, device_location deviceLocation, device_ip deviceIp, status, last_online_time lastOnlineTime, remark, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_camera_device
and device_name like concat('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
and device_location like concat('%', #{deviceLocation}, '%')
and device_ip like concat('%', #{deviceIp}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by status asc, id desc

select
from t_camera_device where device_ip = #{deviceIp} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_camera_device (device_name, device_location, device_ip, status, last_online_time, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{deviceName}, #{deviceLocation}, #{deviceIp}, #{status}, #{lastOnlineTime}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_camera_device set device_name = #{deviceName}, device_location = #{deviceLocation}, device_ip = #{deviceIp}, status = #{status}, last_online_time = #{lastOnlineTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
